purpose: settings.output_to_file and output_file_name both left unset on the hello-world program: the knob readbacks pin the defaults False (pyreason.py:67) and 'pyreason_output' (pyreason.py:68), reason() skips the stdout rebind (the pyreason.py:1513/:1541 branches are not taken), and the output_file probe reads the capture's confined working directory back empty — no redirect file exists, verbose reasoning prints stayed on process stdout. The default-false-stdout class (setting:output_to_file) and the default-name class (setting:output_file_name); the baseline twin whose reasoning probe digests output-to-file-on matched at authoring (the harness judges each case within one knob position).
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md setting:output_to_file default-false-stdout and setting:output_file_name default-name; hello-world program with both knob readbacks and the no-file observation
